subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls! Praise be to God that the niche of the heart hath been illumined by the lamp of guidance, and the senses of the soul perfumed with the fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه حمد خدا را که مشکاه قلب بمصباح هدی منور شد و مشام جان برائحه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
